title: ruta angustifolia var. bracteosa
intro: Ruta angustifolia var. bracteosa, also known as Rue or Garden Rue, is a perennial herb in the Rutaceae family. It has been used medicinally for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, joint pain, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ruta angustifolia var. bracteosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Ruta angustifolia var. bracteosa can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, and it is often used in aromatherapy and as an ingredient in skincare products.
